original_statement: how many total games were played?
mutated_statement: how many total things were done?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action verb generalization: Specific domain noun "games" replaced by generic "things" (loss of domain specificity) | Verb "played" replaced by generic "done" (specific activity → generic action) (games→things | played→done)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“Counting the rows shows 19 games listed...Therefore, the total number of things done is 19”和iteration中simple_query的解释，Agent直接将泛化后的“things”视作原始域名词“games”，并按表格行数给出具体数值19。日志中没有任何关于问题模糊、不确定或需澄清的表述（未使用ambiguous、unclear、需要更多信息等词汇），也未向用户反问或声明无法回答。因此Agent是在未意识到目标模糊性的前提下直接执行并返回答案，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
